mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Require an authenticator code at sign-in.
mfa.disableDescription: Your account will be less protected. You can turn it back on anytime.
mfa.setupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually.
mfa.recoveryDescription: Store these somewhere safe. Each one works once if you lose your device.
mfa.scanHint: Open Google Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP app and scan this code.

errors.setupFailed: Could not start setup. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code didn’t match. Enter the current 6-digit code.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Sign in without a password using your device.
passkeys.empty: No passkeys yet. Add one to sign in without a password.
passkeys.addDescription: Name it so you can recognize it later. Your device will prompt you to create the passkey.

overview.title: Account protection
overview.description: Quick view of what's guarding your sign-in.
overview.idleProtection: Auto sign-out when idle is active

recoveryCodes.copySuccess: Recovery codes copied — clipboard clears in 1 minute
recoveryCodes.clipboardNotice: Copied secrets are cleared from your clipboard after one minute.
recoveryCodes.acknowledge: I have saved these recovery codes in a safe place

discard.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discard.description: You have unsaved changes. Leaving this section will discard them.

members.title: Members
members.loadFailed: Couldn't load members. Please try again.
members.emptyDescription: Invite teammates to collaborate in this organization.
members.removeDescription: They'll lose access to this organization. You can undo for a few seconds after confirming.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Permission sets you can assign to members.
roles.loadFailed: Couldn't load roles. Please try again.
roles.emptyDescription: Create a custom role to grant a tailored set of permissions.
roles.deleteDescription: Members with this role will need a new one assigned. You can undo for a few seconds after confirming.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: How you appear in the app. Visible to people in your organization.
profile.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to update your profile information?

account.deleteDescription: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be removed.
